headlines.title: NHS to reward people who walk 30 minutes a day
headlines.description: The "marathon a month" scheme, developed with former Olympic medallist Sir Brendan Foster, will launch early next year.

headlines.title: On the Strait of Hormuz, BBC finds seized ships and shark fishermen as uneasy calm returns
headlines.description: The BBC travels to the city of Bandar Abbas - the first international journalists to visit the Iranian side of the strait.

headlines.title: Burnham says there is some room for movement on tax
headlines.description: But the likely next PM says he will stick to Labour's pledges to not raise VAT, income tax or national insurance.

headlines.title: France records 2,025 excess deaths at peak of heatwave as Europe braces for more extreme weather
headlines.description: Forecasters are warning of further extreme temperatures on the continent in the next few days.

headlines.title: Taylor Swift's rumoured wedding celebrations begin with star-studded New York event
headlines.description: Actress Lena Dunham, model Gigi Hadid and longtime music collaborator Jack Antonoff were spotted in formal attire near Madison Square Garden.

headlines.title: Pubs allowed to stay open until 5am on Monday for England Mexico match
headlines.description: The government had initially said it would not relax licensing laws further for the World Cup.

headlines.title: Instagram running ads promoting child sexual abuse material in India, BBC finds
headlines.description: The ads use terms including “rape” and “child video” and link to content on the messaging app Telegram.

headlines.title: 'Less than 10% sheep': How millions may have unknowingly eaten goat, skin and fat kebabs
headlines.description: Millions are likely to have eaten "lamb" kebabs that were actually made with goat, skin and fat.

headlines.title: Rare copy of US Declaration of Independence found by volunteer in UK archives
headlines.description: The newly discovered copy is one of only 11 of its kind in the world.

headlines.title: 'Truly international network' of men drugging and raping women uncovered, NCA says
headlines.description: Eight arrests have been made as the National Crime Agency says it has identified 270 people linked to the abuse websites.

headlines.title: Iran begins public mourning for Ayatollah killed in February
headlines.description: Ali Khamenei's body will lie in state in Tehran's Grand Mosalla from Friday ahead of days-long funeral events.

headlines.title: Tuchel wants young England fans to stay up for 1am World Cup clash - but should they?
headlines.description: England's must-win match against Mexico kicks off at 01:00 BST on Monday - disco naps and spoiler-free recaps may be needed.

headlines.title: Victorious Portugal pay emotional tribute to Jota
headlines.description: One year after his death, Portugal are using Diogo Jota's memory to help inspire them at the 2026 World Cup.

headlines.title: Why Wonderwall has become England's World Cup anthem
headlines.description: Post-victory singalongs between England fans and players have become a new tradition this summer.

headlines.title: What will guests wear to Taylor Swift's  wedding of the century?
headlines.description: Romantic, fairytale vibes could dominate Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's reported wedding event in New York City on Friday.

headlines.title: After 250 years the American Dream is surviving, but only just
headlines.description: The American Dream has persisted since the days of the Founding Fathers, but faith in the ideal is fading

headlines.title: Weekly quiz: Why did the princess climb the UK's three highest peaks?
headlines.description: How much attention did you pay to what happened in the world over the past seven days?

headlines.title: AI is 'not smart' so what's next in artificial intelligence?
headlines.description: Leading AI researcher Yan LeCun has a start-up which is developing a more flexible AI system.

headlines.title: I started selling clothes from my nana's house - now I'm turning over £10m
headlines.description: Murci has grown from a side hustle to being featured on Love Island and promoted by influencers.

headlines.title: Mother says new custodial sentences for daughter's rapists 'better' but still 'not enough'
headlines.description: Two teenage boys convicted of rape had initially been given non-custodial sentences but have since been handed a four year detention.

headlines.title: Survivor pulled from rubble eight days after Venezuela earthquakes
headlines.description: Hernán Gil was trapped under a collapsed multi-storey car park.

headlines.title: Tackle workplace sickness to unlock hidden growth, former John Lewis boss says
headlines.description: More than 250 of the UK's biggest employers have signed up to his 'Get Britain Working' taskforce.

headlines.title: Arrest warrant issued for suspect in Monaco parcel bombing
headlines.description: Monaco's prosecutor's office say the suspect is a foreign national and no longer in Monaco.

headlines.title: I was 'slam dunk' for SNP leadership until revealing gay marriage views, says Kate Forbes
headlines.description: The former deputy first minister says she was advised to lie about her opinions on same-sex marriage.

headlines.title: Gannet colonies could take 15 years to recover from bird flu
headlines.description: The 2022 outbreak led to an "unprecedented deadly blow" to the seabird colonies in Scotland and Wales.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: What Does It Cost To Keep The UK Safe?
headlines.description: The government releases it’s long awaited defence investment plan.

headlines.title: Has the Supreme Court just made Trump the most powerful president in history?
headlines.description: A landmark decision expands Trump’s presidential power

headlines.title: Huge Snicko VAR call prolongs Ronaldo's last dance but ends Modric's
headlines.description: Veteran forward Cristiano Ronaldo gets another day on the World Cup stage after Croatia are denied a late equaliser by a huge VAR call.

headlines.title: Germany want Klopp talks as Nagelsmann resigns
headlines.description: The German football association is seeking talks with Jurgen Klopp about becoming their men's national team coach after Julian Nagelsmann resigned.

headlines.title: Four-time Tour de France winner Froome retires
headlines.description: Great Britain's Chris Froome, who won the Tour de France four times, brings an end to his illustrious career in professional cycling.

headlines.title: The one club man who is Spain's under-the-radar hero
headlines.description: Mikel Oyarzabal is perhaps not the biggest name in Spain's World Cup squad, but the one who has so far shone brightest.

headlines.title: Usyk in Zuffa talks for farewell bout with Wilder
headlines.description: Oleksandr Usyk is in talks with Dana White's Zuffa Boxing for a farewell fight against Deontay Wilder in America.
